mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory ( sku_id, quantity, locked_quantity, available_quantity, warning_quantity, location, batch_number, production_date, expiry_date, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{skuId}, #{quantity}, #{lockedQuantity}, #{availableQuantity}, #{warningQuantity}, #{location}, #{batchNumber}, #{productionDate}, #{expiryDate}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory SET quantity = #{quantity}, locked_quantity = #{lockedQuantity}, available_quantity = #{availableQuantity}, warning_quantity = #{warningQuantity}, location = #{location}, batch_number = #{batchNumber}, production_date = #{productionDate}, expiry_date = #{expiryDate}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE inventory SET quantity = #{quantity}, locked_quantity = #{lockedQuantity}, available_quantity = #{availableQuantity}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM inventory WHERE available_quantity <= warning_quantity AND status = 'NORMAL' ORDER BY available_quantity ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT * FROM inventory WHERE expiry_date BETWEEN NOW() AND DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND status = 'NORMAL' ORDER BY expiry_date ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory SET locked_quantity = locked_quantity + #{quantity}, available_quantity = available_quantity - #{quantity}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND available_quantity >= #{quantity}
UPDATE inventory SET quantity = quantity - #{quantity}, available_quantity = available_quantity - #{quantity}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND available_quantity >= #{quantity}
UPDATE inventory SET locked_quantity = locked_quantity - #{quantity}, available_quantity = available_quantity + #{quantity}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND locked_quantity >= #{quantity}
UPDATE inventory SET quantity = quantity + #{quantity}, available_quantity = available_quantity + #{quantity}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
